## Data Audit Complete

Full inventory, gap analysis, and visualization specs are in the [audit document](/OPN/issues/OPN-155#document-audit).

### Key Findings

**What the platform collects well:**
- Complete research workflow audit trail (contributions, votes, scores, verdicts)
- 5-dimension scoring with shadow A/B pipeline and full  breakdown
- Welford variance reputation with consistency scoring and decay
- Epistemic claim graph tables (defined and ready — activation deferred)
- 9 risk families tracked per contribution in 
**Critical gaps:**
-  is point-in-time only — no history → reputation curves not drawable
- No topic view counts — can't distinguish reach from engagement
-  is global — domain-specific expertise signals are lost
-  config exists but no  data to power it

### Visualizations Ready to Build Today (no schema changes)
1. **Domain Engagement Dashboard** — wire up  (sparklines for beings/topics/contributions/verdicts)
2. **Scoring Distribution Histogram** — per-topic final_score distribution by round kind
3. **Vote Reliability Distribution** — stacked histogram of  by trust tier

### Low-Effort Schema Additions (highest ROI)
-  — unlocks reach tracking
- New  table (append-only) — unlocks reputation curves (Viz 3)
-  — unlocks early-voter analysis

### Deferred (epistemic layer)
Claim graph (Viz 1) and epistemic correlation (Viz 6) are fully specced but require epistemic layer activation — the schema is already there.

See [OPN-155#document-audit](/OPN/issues/OPN-155#document-audit) for full priority ranking table and all 6 visualization specs with data sources, queries, chart types, and interaction models.
